rulings.Case Title: MAGCO DRILLING, INC. VS. NATOMA FAMILY HOUSING, L.P., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 20, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANTS NATOMA FAMILY HOUSING, L.P. and ST. JOSEPH'S FAMILY ASSOCIATES, L.P.'s MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES Continued to April 6, 2017 on Court's own motion. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: ROBIN WHITESIDE ET AL VS. LAURANT RUESSMANN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Laurent Ruessmann For Judgment Or Partial Judgment On The Pleadings Against Plaintiffs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 20, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT LAURENT RUESSMANN's Motion For Judgment Or Partial Judgment On The Pleadings Against Plaintiffs DENIED. At the pleading stage the "intention of the parties" cannot be properly addressed. Keene v. Harling (1964) 61 Cal.2d 318. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: BERRY JOE CORPORATION VS. RAYMOND S CHOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Staying Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 20, 2017, line 3. PLAINTIFF BERRY JOE CORPORATION's Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Staying Action GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The Motion is granted as to the first issue as it is subject to arbitration clause per paragraph 5(4). The motion is denied as to the second issue. "[A] party can be forced to arbitrate only those issues it specifically has agreed to submit to arbitration." Greenspan v. LADT, LLC (2010) 185 Cal.App.4th 1413. Moving party fails to point to any portion of the agreements providing for arbitration of the second issue. The action is stayed pending the resolution of the arbitration. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: RANDY T. HOM VS. METROPOLITAN BANK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 20, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT METROPOLITAN BANK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to April 20, 2017 for Plaintiff to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of late-filed opposition no later than March 30, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court will consider late-filed opposition. Defendant to file a substantive reply five court days before the new hearing date. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. BELETA MOORE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Restrict Access To Court Record
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 20, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT WILHELMINA IRIBARREN's Motion To Restrict Access To Court Record GRANTED. Records shall be restricted per CCP 1161.2. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LAN B. LEE VS. TYLER MCAFEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 20, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANTS TYLER MCAFEE and HARI KHALSA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint states a cause of action and is not uncertain. Moving party fails to state any authority is support of its argument. The Court also notes that a courtesy copy of reply was received, however there is no reply on file. = (501/AJR)
